title: Quarterly Business Review - TechStart Inc
transcript_excerpt: Li Wei: Honestly, the biggest pain point is your API documentation. Every time we try to integrate a new endpoint, we find the docs are either wrong or missing. My team spent two weeks on what should have been a one-day integration. Sarah: I hear you, and I know this has come up before... Li Wei: It has, and nothing has changed. We're evaluating alternatives if this doesn't improve by next quarter.

title: Discovery Call - Globex Manufacturing
transcript_excerpt: Dana: We looked at your pricing page but honestly the tiers don't make sense for manufacturing. You have per-seat pricing but we need per-facility. Alex: That's great feedback, let me take that back... Dana: Your competitor already offers facility-based pricing. We need an answer this week or we're going with them.

title: Support Escalation Review - DataFlow Labs
transcript_excerpt: James: This is the fifth P1 ticket we've filed about the same issue. Your webhook delivery is unreliable — we're seeing 15% message loss during peak hours. Priya: We've patched this twice but the fix isn't holding. Mike: James, I understand your frustration. Let me get engineering leadership involved directly.

title: Team Standup Recording - Platform Team
transcript_excerpt: Sarah: Sprint velocity is down 30% this month. Half our points are going to unplanned work — incident response, debugging flaky tests, answering questions from other teams because nothing is documented. Engineer 1: I spent all of yesterday helping the new hire figure out how to run the test suite locally. There's no guide for it. Sarah: That's exactly the problem. We're losing productive time to tribal knowledge transfer.

title: Win/Loss Analysis - Lost Deal Review
transcript_excerpt: Alex: We lost the Meridian deal to a competitor. The main reason was implementation timeline — they quoted 2 weeks, we quoted 6-8. VP Sales: Why is our implementation so much longer? Alex: Honestly, our onboarding process is manual. No self-serve setup, no automated provisioning. Every new customer needs hands-on engineering time. Product Lead: This is the third deal this quarter we've lost on implementation speed.
